description_long: This object consists of eight vertically oriented traffic signal modules, each with three circular signal lights arranged in a column. The modules are grouped in two rows of four, with each module featuring a black housing and visible colored lenses for red, yellow, and green signals. Some modules display arrow indicators, suggesting directional control for turning lanes. The housings are robust and angular, with mounting brackets and hardware visible along the sides. The rear and side views reveal the depth and modular construction of each signal unit, while the front view highlights the colored lenses and arrows. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for durability and visibility in urban intersections.
description: A set of eight black, vertically stacked traffic signal modules with colored circular lenses and directional arrows, arranged in two rows. The design is robust and functional, suitable for urban intersections.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight traffic signal modules, each with three colored lenses and some with arrow indicators.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and stacked arrangement of the signal modules, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear/top view showing the backs of the modules and the circular outlines of the signal housings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the vertical stacking and depth of the modules.
